recommendations.title: Suspiria
recommendations.overview: An American newcomer to a prestigious German ballet academy comes to realize that the school is a front for something sinister amid a series of grisly murders.

recommendations.title: Rise
recommendations.overview: Elise thought she had the perfect life: an ideal boyfriend and a promising career as a ballet dancer. It all falls apart the day she catches him cheating on her with her stage backup; and after she suffers an injury on stage, it seems like she might

recommendations.title: Let's Dance
recommendations.overview: After his crew breaks up, a gifted but insecure hip-hop dancer teaches at a top ballet school in Paris, where he falls for an aspiring ballerina.

recommendations.title: Polina
recommendations.overview: Polina is a young dancer from a modest family. After years of ballet academy, she is accepted by the Bolshoi; still, she decides to try and audition of a modern dance company in France. She makes it, but her journey will not end there...

recommendations.title: Into the Beat
recommendations.overview: Katya is a young, outstanding and upcoming ballet dancer. In just a few weeks she is due to have a major audition for the New York Ballet Academy and Katya has good chances of getting a scholarship. But when she meets a group of street-dancers the gi

recommendations.title: Limelight
recommendations.overview: A fading music hall comedian tries to help a despondent ballet dancer learn to walk and to again feel confident about life.

recommendations.title: Hindi Medium
recommendations.overview: Mita and Raj Batra, an affluent couple from Delhi’s Chandni Chowk, are grappling with getting their daughter admission into an English medium school. But there is one big problem. Their zubaan is Hindi, and the elitist snobs won’t let the Hindi speak

recommendations.title: Mao’s Last Dancer
recommendations.overview: At the age of 11, Li was plucked from a poor Chinese village by Madame Mao's cultural delegates and taken to Beijing to study ballet. In 1979, during a cultural exchange to Texas, he falls in love with an American woman. Two years later, he managed t

recommendations.title: Center Stage: Turn It Up
recommendations.overview: All self-taught dancer Kate Parker has ever wanted to do was perform with the American Academy of Ballet. But when she doesnt make it after auditioning, she learns that it takes more than precision and perfection to succeed in the dance world.

recommendations.title: The Company
recommendations.overview: Ensemble drama centered around a group of ballet dancers, with a focus on one young dancer who's poised to become a principal performer.
